parameters.subject: Purchase Request {{ $json.pr_id }} — Auto-Approved
parameters.message:
Dear {{ $json.requester_name }},

Your purchase request {{ $json.pr_id }} for {{ $json.currency }} {{ $json.amount }} has been automatically approved.

Description: {{ $json.description }}
PO Number: {{ $json.po_number }}
Category: {{ $json.category }}

The purchase order has been created in the ERP system. You will receive a separate confirmation once the PO is sent to the supplier.

Best regards,
Procurement Agent

parameters.subject: Approval Required: Purchase Request {{ $json.pr_id }} — {{ $json.currency }} {{ $json.amount }}
parameters.message:
Dear {{ $json.cost_center_head_name }},

A purchase request requires your approval.

PR ID{{ $json.pr_id }}
Requester{{ $json.requester_name }}
Amount{{ $json.currency }} {{ $json.amount }}
Category{{ $json.category }}
Description{{ $json.description }}
Preferred Supplier{{ $json.preferred_supplier ?? 'Not specified' }}
Supplier Compliance{{ $json.compliance_summary }}

Approve  Reject

If you do not respond within 48 hours, a reminder will be sent.

Best regards,
Procurement Agent

nodes.name: SMTP: Cost Center Head Approval Request

parameters.subject: RFQ Initiation Required: PR {{ $json.pr_id }} — {{ $json.currency }} {{ $json.amount }}
parameters.message:
Dear Category Manager,

A purchase request in your category requires RFQ initiation.

PR ID{{ $json.pr_id }}
Requester{{ $json.requester_name }}
Amount{{ $json.currency }} {{ $json.amount }}
Category{{ $json.category }}
Description{{ $json.description }}
Required by{{ $json.required_by_date ?? 'Not specified' }}

Supplier Compliance Report

{{ $json.compliance_summary }}

Suggested Supplier Shortlist

{{ $json.supplier_shortlist }}

Please review and confirm the supplier shortlist, then the agent will send the RFQ emails automatically.

Best regards,
Procurement Agent

parameters.subject: RFQ+ Initiation Required: PR {{ $json.pr_id }} — {{ $json.currency }} {{ $json.amount }}
parameters.message:
Dear Category Manager,

A high-value purchase request requires a formal RFQ with a minimum of 3 supplier quotes.

PR ID{{ $json.pr_id }}
Requester{{ $json.requester_name }}
Amount{{ $json.currency }} {{ $json.amount }}
Category{{ $json.category }}
Description{{ $json.description }}

Supplier Compliance Report

{{ $json.compliance_summary }}

Suggested Supplier Shortlist (min. 3 required)

{{ $json.supplier_shortlist }}

Please confirm or adjust the shortlist. The agent will generate the formal RFQ document and send to all suppliers.

Best regards,
Procurement Agent

parameters.subject: Business Case Required: Purchase Request {{ $json.pr_id }}
parameters.message:
Dear {{ $json.requester_name }},

Your purchase request {{ $json.pr_id }} for {{ $json.currency }} {{ $json.amount }} exceeds the RFP threshold and requires a formal business case before the sourcing process can begin.

The procurement agent will guide you through the business case questionnaire. Please reply to this email or access the intake form to get started.

You will be asked about:

  • Business problem and expected value
  • User base and ownership
  • Contract value, duration, and renewal terms
  • Data security and privacy requirements
  • Integration and implementation scope
  • Cost of inaction (status quo risk)

Once your business case is complete, it will be forwarded to the Category Manager to initiate the RFP process.

Best regards,
Procurement Agent

main.node: SMTP: Cost Center Head Approval Request

meta.description: Receives routing decisions from the LangGraph agent and sends the appropriate SMTP email: auto-approve confirmation, cost center head approval request (with approve/reject links), or category manager RFQ/RFP initiation notice.
